DP.566.0000:
You’re holding a Flag!
You can’t deal with this now!\f
Or, would you like to throw away
the Flag you’re holding?
DP.566.0005:
Something is buried in front of you.
But you’re holding a Flag!
DP.566.0006:
You don’t have the time to stop
and chat!
DP.566.0007:
The obtained Flag was registered
on the PC!
DP.566.0008:
You’ve obtained the Flag
from [0101,0000]’s Base!
DP.566.0014:
...\f
One Flag has been registered,
so your Flag became a Bronze Flag!\f
You may now display up to a dozen
decoration goods.\f
You may also put away one Big
Boulder.
DP.566.0015:
...\f
Three Flags have been registered,
so your Flag became a Silver Flag!\f
You may now display up to 15
decoration goods.\f
You may also put away five Big
Boulders.
DP.566.0016:
...\f
Ten Flags have been registered,
so your Flag became a Gold Flag!\f
You may now put away ten Big
Boulders.\f
You may now also use the Radar from
your PC.
DP.566.0017:
...\f
Fifty Flags have been registered,
so your Flag became a Platinum Flag!\f
You may now put away any number
of Big Boulders.
